nav.logoutConfirmDesc: You'll be signed out of your current session. You can sign back in at any time.

footer.tagline: Connecting Canadian homebuyers with trusted mortgage brokers, privately and securely.
footer.disclaimer: mortly is a mortgage marketplace. We do not provide mortgage advice or lending services.

home.subtitle: Describe your mortgage needs without publishing direct contact details.
home.subtitle2: Verified brokers can respond inside mortly so you can compare options on your terms.
home.threeSteps: Three Simple Steps to Your Ideal Broker
home.step1Desc: Describe your mortgage needs without publishing direct contact details. Share your loan amount, property type, timeline, and preferences while keeping identifying details out of the standard listing.
home.step2Desc: Verified brokers review your request and express interest. Compare their profiles, specializations, and proposed approaches side by side.
home.step3Desc: Continue the conversation in mortly, and share direct contact details only if you decide to move off-platform.
home.trustDesc: Your confidence is our foundation. Every aspect of mortly is designed to protect your privacy and ensure quality.
home.privacyFirstDesc: Your direct contact details are not shown to brokers in standard marketplace flows. Compare introductions and messages inside mortly first.
home.verifiedBrokersDesc: Every broker on mortly must provide licensing information before marketplace access. Broker access is controlled through verification status and admin review.
home.noCommitmentDesc: Explore your options freely. There is no obligation to connect with any broker and no fees for borrowers — ever.
home.readyDesc: Submit your request in minutes and let brokers come to you.
home.disclaimerFull: mortly is a marketplace platform that connects borrowers with licensed mortgage brokers. We do not provide mortgage advice, make lending decisions, or act as a lender. All mortgage products and services are offered by independent, licensed brokers. Please consult with a qualified professional before making any financial decisions.

live.title: Live Request Activity
live.subtitle: Borrowers are submitting requests right now

valueProp.title: Whether You're Borrowing or Brokering
valueProp.borrowerBullet1: Post your mortgage needs without publishing direct contact details
valueProp.borrowerBullet2: Compare multiple broker proposals side by side
valueProp.borrowerBullet3: Connect only when you're ready, on your terms
valueProp.borrowerBullet4: Always free — no fees, no obligations
valueProp.brokerBullet1: Access qualified leads without spending on ads
valueProp.brokerBullet2: Showcase your expertise and track record to borrowers
valueProp.brokerBullet3: Build your reputation on a trusted platform
valueProp.brokerBullet4: Flexible subscription plans that fit your business

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Is my personal information really private?
faq.a1: Verified brokers see your request details, not your direct contact details. Conversations happen inside mortly, and you decide whether to share phone, email, or other identifying details in a message.
faq.q3: Does it cost anything for borrowers?
faq.a3: No. mortly is completely free for borrowers. There are no fees, no hidden charges, and no obligations. You can explore offers and compare brokers at no cost.
faq.a4: Brokers respond through mortly's messaging tools. You can review introductions and messages in-platform before deciding whether to share direct contact details.
faq.q5: What types of mortgages can I find?
faq.a5: Our brokers cover a wide range — purchases, refinancing, renewals, HELOCs, commercial mortgages, and more. Simply describe your needs and receive tailored proposals.

borrowerDashboard.noRequestsDesc: Submit your first mortgage request to get matched with verified brokers.
borrowerDashboard.subtitle: Track your mortgage requests and broker introductions.

request.title: New Mortgage Request
request.subtitle: Tell us about your mortgage needs. Direct contact details are not part of your public request.
request.privacyNote: Verified brokers can see the mortgage details you submit here. If you want to keep identifying details out of the marketplace, do not include your phone number, email address, or other identifying details in free-text fields.
request.privacyReminder: Messages happen inside mortly. Share phone numbers, email addresses, or other identifying details only when you are ready.
request.privacyReminderFinancial: Your financial details are only shared with brokers who respond to your request.
request.waitingForBrokersDetail: Your request was submitted. Brokers typically respond within 24 hours.
request.expirationNote: Requests expire after 30 days of inactivity.
request.pendingApprovalNote: Your request is under review. You'll be notified once approved.
request.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This will permanently delete your request and all related conversations.
request.categoryQuestion: What type of financing are you looking for?
request.annualIncome: Annual income (last 2 years, based on tax filing)
request.corporateFinancials: Corporate annual income & expenses (last 2 years, based on tax filing)
request.incomeHelperText: Enter your income for the current year and one prior year
request.commercialFinancialsHelper: Enter both income and expenses for each year
request.desiredTimelinePlaceholder: e.g. Within 3 months, ASAP, Just exploring
request.additionalDetailsHelper: The more detail you provide, the better a broker can assist you.
request.newRequestSubtitle: Tell us about your financing needs. Your direct contact details are not shown automatically.
request.legacyFormat: This request was submitted in the previous format.

messages.title: Messages
messages.noConversationsDescBorrower: Browse broker introductions to start chatting.
messages.noConversationsDescBroker: Browse and respond to requests to connect with borrowers.
messages.selectConversationDesc: Choose a conversation from the list to start messaging.
messages.noMessages: No messages yet. Start the conversation below.
messages.closeConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to close this conversation? You will no longer be able to send or receive messages.
messages.privacyReminder: If you want to keep direct contact details private, do not include them in chat until you are ready to share them.
messages.disclaimerBody:
Mortly is a marketplace platform that connects those exploring mortgage options with mortgage professionals.
Consultations provided here are offered independently by each mortgage professional.
As Mortly is not a party to the consultation, we do not assume responsibility for the content or outcomes of individual consultations.
messages.brokerDisclaimerBody:
Mortly is a marketplace platform that connects those exploring mortgage options with mortgage professionals.
Consultation requests listed here are submitted directly by clients. Mortly does not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of any request details.

manual.title: Admin Manual
manual.subtitle: Complete guide to managing the mortly platform.
manual.overviewP1: The admin portal gives you full control over the mortly platform. From here you can manage users, verify brokers, oversee requests and conversations, handle reports, and review a complete audit trail of all administrative actions.
manual.overviewP2: All admin pages use client-side filtering — data is loaded once when the page opens, and search/filter changes are instant without reloading. Every action you take (status changes, credit adjustments, verifications, deletions) is automatically logged to the activity log.
manual.overviewP2v2: All admin list pages use server-side pagination (20 items per page) with page navigation controls. Search and filter changes trigger a fresh data load. Every action you take (status changes, credit adjustments, verifications, deletions) is automatically logged to the activity log.
manual.overviewTip: Tip: All admin pages are accessible from the dashboard quick links. You can also navigate directly via the URL bar (e.g., /admin/users, /admin/requests).
manual.dashboardP1: The dashboard (/admin/dashboard) is your landing page. It shows six live statistics:
manual.dashboardStat1: Total Users — all registered accounts on the platform
manual.dashboardStat2: Pending Verifications — brokers waiting for license verification
manual.dashboardStat3: Active Requests — borrower requests currently open or in progress
manual.dashboardStat4: Open Reports — user-submitted reports that need attention
manual.dashboardStat6: Total Requests — all borrower requests ever created
manual.dashboardP2: Below the stats, quick link cards take you directly to each admin tool. Each card shows a live count so you can prioritize where to look first.
manual.userManagementP1: The user management page (/admin/users) shows every account on the platform — borrowers, brokers, and other admins.
manual.userSearch1: Search by name, email, or 9-digit public user ID
manual.userSearch2: Filter by role: All, Borrowers, Brokers, Admins
manual.userSearch3: Results update instantly as you type — no need to press Enter
manual.userCol2: User ID — the 9-digit public ID (click to copy to clipboard)
manual.userCol3: Role — BORROWER, BROKER, or ADMIN badge
manual.userCol4: Status — ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, or BANNED badge
manual.userCol5: Details — for brokers: brokerage name, subscription tier, and credit count. For borrowers: request and conversation counts
manual.userCol7: Actions — available actions based on the user's current state
manual.accountActionsP1: You can change a user's account status. These actions are available for non-admin users only (you cannot suspend or ban other admins):
manual.accountAction1: Suspend — temporarily restricts login. The user sees a 'suspended' message when trying to sign in. Use for warnings or investigations.
manual.accountAction2: Ban — permanently blocks the account. The user sees a 'banned' message. Use for confirmed policy violations.
manual.accountAction3: Reactivate — restores a suspended or banned account back to active status.
manual.accountActionsWarning: Warning: Suspending or banning a user takes effect immediately. They will be blocked on their next login attempt.
manual.creditAdjP1: For broker accounts, a 'Credits' button opens a modal where you can add or remove response credits:
manual.creditAdj1: Enter a positive number to add credits (e.g., 5)
manual.creditAdj2: Enter a negative number to remove credits (e.g., -3)
manual.creditAdj3: Always provide a reason (e.g., 'Refund for spam request', 'Promotional bonus')
manual.creditAdj4: The new balance is shown immediately after confirmation
manual.creditAdjTip: Tip: Credit adjustments are logged in the activity log with the amount, previous balance, new balance, and your reason.
manual.brokerManagementP1: The broker management page (/admin/brokers) lists all broker profiles with their key information at a glance.
manual.brokerCol1b: User ID — the broker's user 9-digit public ID
manual.brokerCol3: Province — where the broker is licensed
manual.brokerCol5: Status — verification status: PENDING, VERIFIED, or REJECTED
manual.brokerCol6: Tier — subscription tier: FREE, BASIC, PRO, or PREMIUM
manual.brokerCol7: Actions — View (opens detail page), Verify, or Suspend buttons
manual.brokerCol8: Actions — View (opens detail page), Verify, or Suspend buttons
manual.brokerAction1: View — opens the full broker detail page
manual.brokerAction2: Verify — instantly approves a pending broker (one click)
manual.brokerAction3: Suspend — rejects a broker's verification (they can no longer view requests or send introductions)
manual.brokerFilterP1: Use the status filter dropdown to narrow the list to only PENDING, VERIFIED, or REJECTED brokers.
manual.brokerDetailP1: Clicking 'View' on any broker (from the broker list or user management page) opens a comprehensive detail page (/admin/brokers/[id]).
manual.brokerSection1: Header — broker name, public user ID, verification badge, subscription tier badge, account status badge
manual.brokerSection2: Profile Info — brokerage, email, license number, province, mortgage category, experience, areas served, specialties, member since, bio
manual.brokerSection3: Stats Cards — credits remaining, total introductions, and total conversations
manual.brokerSection4: Verification Actions — Approve, Reject, or Reset to Pending buttons (changes take effect immediately)
manual.brokerSection5: Recent Introductions — last 20 introductions with request type, location, status, and date. Click 'View' to go to request management.
manual.brokerSection6: Recent Conversations — last 20 conversations with borrower name, status, message count, and last activity. Click 'Messages' to view the thread.
manual.brokerSection7: No review history is currently shown on this page
manual.brokerSection8: Credit Purchases — purchase history showing pack type, credit count, amount paid, and date
manual.verificationP1: The verification queue (/admin/verification) shows brokers awaiting license verification. This is a focused view — it only shows PENDING brokers.
manual.verificationP2: For each broker you can approve or reject. Approved brokers can immediately start viewing requests and sending introductions (depending on their subscription tier). Rejected brokers are blocked from these features.
manual.verificationTip: Tip: You can also verify brokers from the broker management list or from the broker detail page. All three methods are equivalent.
manual.requestManagementP1: The request management page (/admin/requests) gives you oversight of all borrower mortgage requests on the platform.
manual.requestSearch1: Search by request ID, borrower name, province, or city
manual.requestSearch2: Filter by status: Open, In Progress, Closed, Expired
manual.requestSearch3: Filter by type: Purchase, Refinance, Renewal
manual.requestAction1: Details — opens a modal showing the full request information: borrower, property type, price range, mortgage amount, employment type, credit score band, closing timeline, and notes
manual.requestAction2: Status — opens a modal to change the request status. You must select a new status and can optionally provide a reason. When closing a request, all active conversations are automatically closed too.
manual.requestAction3: Delete — permanently removes the request and ALL related data: introductions, conversations, and messages. This cannot be undone.
manual.requestDeleteWarning: Warning: Deleting a request is irreversible. All associated introductions, conversations, and messages will be permanently removed. Always provide a reason for the audit trail.
manual.conversationsP1: The conversation oversight page (/admin/conversations) lets you monitor all borrower-broker messaging on the platform.
manual.convoList1: Search by participant name, email, or brokerage name
manual.convoList2: Filter by status: Active or Closed
manual.convoList3: Each row shows: participants (with account status badges if suspended or banned), related request info, message count, and the last message preview
manual.convoList3v2: Each row shows: conversation public ID, participants (with account status badges if suspended or banned), related request info, message count, and the last message preview
manual.convoDetailP1: Click 'Messages' to open the full conversation thread (/admin/conversations/[id]). Here you can see:
manual.convoDetailP1v2: Click 'Messages' to open the conversation detail (/admin/conversations/[id]). Messages are displayed as chat bubbles:
manual.convoDetail1: Every message with sender name, role badge (Borrower/Broker/Admin), and timestamp
manual.convoDetail1v2: Borrower messages appear as white bubbles on the left side
manual.convoDetail2: Admin closure messages are highlighted with an amber border
manual.convoDetail2v2: Broker messages appear as green bubbles on the right side
manual.convoDetail3: Conversation info card showing borrower, broker, request details, and status
manual.convoDetail3v2: Admin system messages (e.g., closure notices) appear centered with an amber background
manual.convoDetail5: The conversation public ID is shown in the page header
manual.convoDetail6: Conversation info card shows borrower, broker, request details, and status
manual.convoDetail4: If a review was left, it shows the star rating and comment
manual.closingConvoP1: You can close any active conversation by clicking the 'Close' button. You must provide a reason (e.g., 'Abusive language', 'Spam'). When you close a conversation:
manual.closingConvo1: An admin message is automatically sent to the conversation with the closure reason
manual.closingConvo2: The conversation status changes to CLOSED
manual.closingConvo3: Both the borrower and broker can no longer send messages
manual.closingConvo4: The action is logged in the activity log
manual.reportsP1: The reports page (/admin/reports) shows all user-submitted reports. Users can report brokers, requests, or conversations for policy violations.
manual.reportSearch1: Search by reporter name, reason text, or target ID
manual.reportSearch2: Filter by status: Open, Reviewed, Resolved, Dismissed
manual.reportSearch3: Filter by target type: Broker, Request, Conversation
manual.reportWorkflowP1: Each report has a status lifecycle:
manual.reportStatus2: REVIEWED — you've looked at it but haven't made a decision yet
manual.reportStatus3: RESOLVED — action was taken (e.g., broker suspended, content removed)
manual.reportStatus4: DISMISSED — investigated but no action needed (false report, duplicate, etc.)
manual.reportAction1: View Target — click the target badge (Broker/Request/Conversation) to navigate to the relevant admin page for investigation
manual.reportAction1v2: View Target — click the target's public ID to navigate directly to the broker detail page or conversation detail page for investigation
manual.reportAction2: Add/Edit Notes — open the notes modal to record your investigation findings, resolution details, or follow-up actions. You can also change the report status from this modal.
manual.reportAction3: Resolve — marks the report as resolved and records the resolution timestamp
manual.reportAction4: Dismiss — marks the report as dismissed (no action taken)
manual.reportAction5: Reopen — changes a resolved or dismissed report back to OPEN status for re-investigation
manual.reportTip: Tip: Always add notes before resolving or dismissing a report. Notes help other admins understand what was investigated and why the decision was made.
manual.activityLogP1: The activity log (/admin/activity) is a complete audit trail of every admin action taken on the platform. Every status change, credit adjustment, verification, deletion, and conversation closure is recorded here.
manual.action1: CREDIT_ADJUST — broker credit adjustments with amount and reason
manual.action15: SEND_NOTICE — admin notice sent to a user
manual.activityDetailsP1: Each log entry shows: the admin who performed the action, the action type, the target (user, broker, request, etc.), a timestamp, and detailed information specific to the action type (e.g., previous/new balance for credit adjustments, previous/new status for status changes).
manual.activityFilterP1: Use the filter dropdown to narrow the log to specific action types. This is useful for auditing specific categories of actions (e.g., all credit adjustments, all bans).
manual.publicIdsP1v2: Every user, borrower request, and conversation on the platform has a unique 9-digit public ID (e.g., 482913756). Internal database IDs (CUIDs) are never exposed anywhere in the interface.
manual.publicId1: Users see their ID on their profile/settings page with a note to use it when contacting support
manual.publicId2: Admins can search by public ID in the user management page
manual.publicId3: The public ID is displayed on the broker detail page for quick reference
manual.publicId4: Click any public ID in the admin table to copy it to your clipboard
manual.publicIdReq1: Every borrower request has a unique 9-digit public ID displayed in admin request management
manual.publicIdReq2: Request IDs are used in search, CSV exports, and the activity log
manual.publicIdReq3: Borrowers see their request public ID in the dashboard and request detail pages
manual.publicIdConvo1: Every conversation has a unique 9-digit public ID shown in conversation oversight
manual.publicIdConvo2: Borrowers and brokers see the conversation ID in their chat headers
manual.publicIdConvo3: Clicking a conversation ID in reports navigates directly to the conversation detail page
manual.publicIdReport1: All report target IDs display as public IDs — click to navigate to the target's detail page
manual.publicIdReport2: All admin action target IDs in the activity log use public IDs
manual.publicIdReport3: Legacy records with old internal IDs are automatically resolved to public IDs when displayed
manual.publicIdsP2v2: When a user contacts support, ask for their 9-digit ID to quickly locate their account, request, or conversation.
manual.auditTrailP1: Every admin action is automatically logged. You don't need to do anything — the system records who did what, when, and why.
manual.bestPractice1: Always provide a reason when suspending, banning, or adjusting credits — the reason is saved in the audit trail
manual.bestPractice2: Add notes to reports before resolving or dismissing — this helps other admins understand your decision
manual.bestPractice3: Use 'Suspend' as a first step for investigations, 'Ban' only for confirmed violations
manual.bestPractice4: Check the activity log regularly to stay aware of actions taken by other admins
manual.bestPractice5: When closing a conversation, provide a clear reason — it's sent as a message visible to both parties
manual.bestPractice6: Before deleting a request, verify it's truly spam/fraud — deletion is permanent and removes all associated data
manual.bestPractice7: Verify broker licenses carefully — approved brokers immediately gain access to borrower requests
manual.csvExportP1: Several admin pages include a CSV export button that lets you download the current data as a spreadsheet-compatible file.
manual.csvExportPage1: User Management — exports all users with name, email, public ID, role, status, and join date
manual.csvExportPage2: Reports — exports all reports with reporter, target, reason, status, and dates
manual.csvExportPage3: Activity Log — exports all admin actions with admin name, action type, target, details, and timestamp
manual.csvExportNote1: The exported file includes all data, not just the currently filtered view
manual.csvExportNote2: Files are named with the current date (e.g., users_2025-01-15.csv)
manual.csvExportNote3: CSV files include a BOM header for proper Excel encoding of special characters and Korean text
manual.bulkActionsP1: The user management page supports bulk actions, allowing you to apply status changes to multiple users at once.
manual.bulkHow1: Use the checkboxes in the leftmost column to select individual users
manual.bulkHow2: Use the header checkbox to select or deselect all visible users
manual.bulkHow3: A bulk action bar appears at the top when users are selected, showing the count
manual.bulkHow4: Choose an action: Suspend All, Ban All, or Reactivate All
manual.bulkActionsWarning: Warning: Bulk actions apply immediately to all selected users. Admin accounts are excluded from selection. Each individual status change is logged separately in the activity log.
manual.noticesP1: Admins can send notices directly to individual users. Notices appear as a bell notification in the user's navigation bar.
manual.noticeSend1: On the user management page, click the 'Notice' button in any non-admin user's action column
manual.noticeSend2: Enter a subject line and message body in the modal
manual.noticeSend3: Click 'Send Notice' to deliver the notification
manual.noticeSend4: The action is logged in the activity log as SEND_NOTICE
manual.noticeReceive1: A bell icon with a red badge appears in the navigation bar showing unread count
manual.noticeReceive2: Clicking the bell opens a dropdown with all notices, newest first
manual.noticeReceive3: Unread notices show a blue dot indicator
manual.noticeReceive4: Clicking a notice marks it as read
manual.noticesTip: Tip: Use notices for account warnings, policy reminders, or important platform announcements targeted at specific users.
manual.settingsP1: The settings page (/admin/settings) allows you to configure platform-wide values without code changes. Changes are saved to the database and logged in the activity log.
manual.setting1: Platform Name — the display name of the platform
manual.setting2: Support Email — the contact email shown to users
manual.setting3: Free / Basic / Pro / Premium Tier Credits — default monthly credits for each subscription tier
manual.setting4: Max Requests Per User — maximum number of active requests a borrower can have
manual.setting5: Request Expiry Days — number of days before an open request expires automatically
manual.setting6: Maintenance Mode — toggle to enable/disable a maintenance mode flag
manual.settingsNote1: Changes are tracked as drafts until you click 'Save Changes'
manual.settingsNote2: Only modified values are saved — unchanged settings are not rewritten
manual.settingsNote3: All setting changes are logged as UPDATE_SETTINGS in the activity log
manual.settingsWarning: Warning: Settings changes take effect immediately. Changing tier credits affects future billing cycles, not retroactively.
manual.trendsP1: The dashboard includes a 30-day trends chart showing daily counts of new users, requests, and conversations as a stacked bar chart.
manual.trend1: Hover over any bar to see exact counts for that date
manual.trend2: The chart updates automatically when the dashboard loads
manual.trend3: Date labels show in Korean format when viewing in Korean language

consultation.step1Desc: Your request is live. Verified brokers can now respond inside mortly.
consultation.step2Desc: You have active conversations with brokers. Review and respond in Messages.
consultation.pendingApproval: Your request is being reviewed before brokers can see it.

howItWorks.title: How mortly Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A practical marketplace flow that lets borrowers compare broker responses inside mortly before deciding what to share.
howItWorks.borrowerTitle: Your Journey to the Right Broker
howItWorks.readyDesc: Submit your request in minutes — it is completely free for borrowers.
howItWorks.bStep1Desc: Tell us about your mortgage needs — property type, budget, timeline, and preferences. Your request goes live without publishing direct contact details.
howItWorks.bStep2Desc: Licensed, verified brokers in your area review your request. Interested brokers send you their introduction, including their experience, approach, and how they can help.
howItWorks.bStep3Desc: Review broker profiles, ratings, and introductions side by side. Take your time — there is no pressure or commitment at any stage.
howItWorks.bStep4Desc: Keep the conversation in mortly for as long as you like. If you decide to share direct contact details or continue off-platform, that choice is yours.
howItWorks.faq1Q: Is mortly really free for borrowers?
howItWorks.faq1A: Yes, completely free. Borrowers do not pay to use mortly. The platform is funded by broker subscriptions.
howItWorks.faq2A: Brokers see your request details and can respond inside mortly, but mortly does not automatically disclose your direct contact details through standard request browsing or messaging. If you share identifying information in a message, that choice is yours.
howItWorks.faq3Q: What if I don't like any of the brokers?
howItWorks.faq3A: No problem at all. There is zero obligation to connect with any broker. You can close your request at any time with no consequences.
howItWorks.faq5Q: Can I receive multiple broker responses?
howItWorks.faq5A: Absolutely. In fact, that is the core value of mortly Multiple qualified brokers can express interest in your request, giving you the power to compare and choose the best fit.
howItWorks.moreQuestions: Have more questions? Email us and we'll do our best to help you —

forBrokers.subtitle: Connect with borrowers who are actively looking for a broker.
forBrokers.subtitle2: No cold outreach, no expensive ads — just qualified leads delivered to your dashboard.
forBrokers.advantageSubtitle: A smarter way to build your client base
forBrokers.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business
forBrokers.ctaSubtitle: Create a broker account, complete verification, and manage leads from one dashboard.
forBrokers.benefit1Desc: Every request comes from a borrower actively seeking a mortgage broker. No tire-kickers, no cold leads — just real opportunities.
forBrokers.benefit2Desc: Stop spending time and money on ads and cold calls. Borrowers come to you, and you choose which opportunities to pursue.
forBrokers.benefit3Desc: Build a detailed profile that showcases your expertise, specialties, and experience inside the marketplace.
forBrokers.benefit4Desc: No long-term contracts, no hidden fees. Choose the plan that fits your business and scale as you grow.
forBrokers.benefit5Desc: Borrowers trust our platform because their data is protected. That trust means higher quality leads and better conversion rates.
forBrokers.benefit6Desc: Manage requests, track introductions, and communicate with borrowers — all from one intuitive, professional dashboard.

forBorrowers.subtitle: Submit a free request without publishing direct contact details. Review broker responses inside mortly and decide if or when to share more.
forBorrowers.whyTitle: The Smarter Way to Find a Broker
forBorrowers.whySubtitle: No cold calls, no pressure — just qualified brokers competing for your business
forBorrowers.benefit1Desc: mortly is completely free for borrowers. No fees, no charges, no hidden costs — ever. Brokers pay to connect with you, not the other way around.
forBorrowers.benefit2Desc: Your request can be reviewed without publishing your direct contact details. Keep conversations inside mortly until you decide to share more.
forBorrowers.benefit3Desc: Every broker on mortly is verified and licensed. We check credentials so you can focus on finding the right fit for your mortgage needs.
forBorrowers.benefit4Desc: Receiving introductions doesn't commit you to anything. Take your time, compare your options, and only move forward when you're comfortable.
forBorrowers.howSubtitle: From request to broker — it's that easy
forBorrowers.step1Desc: Tell us about your mortgage needs — type, province, and any details you'd like to share. It's free, and your direct contact details are not published as part of the standard request listing.
forBorrowers.step2Desc: Licensed brokers review your request and send introductions or messages inside mortly. You'll see their credentials and responses in one place.
forBorrowers.step3Desc: Compare your options and continue the conversation with the broker that fits best. No pressure, no obligation.
forBorrowers.learnMore: Learn more about how it works
forBorrowers.ctaSubtitle: Create a free borrower account and compare broker responses on your timeline.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Monthly plans for verified brokers. Choose a plan based on how many new paid conversations you expect to start.
pricing.subtitle2: Upgrade anytime. Downgrades and cancellations follow the billing flow shown in your account.
pricing.freeDesc: Get verified and browse requests. No introductions included.
pricing.basicDesc: For individual brokers getting started on the platform.
pricing.premiumDesc: Unlimited access to mortly services — the top-tier plan.
pricing.compareSubtitle: A detailed look at what each plan includes
pricing.ctaSubtitle: Create a broker account, complete verification, and manage monthly billing through Stripe.
pricing.creditExplanation: Credits are used when a non-Premium broker starts a new paid response flow. Basic includes 5 monthly credits, Pro includes 20, and Premium does not use credit limits.
pricing.faq1Q: Can I change my plan later?
pricing.faq1A: Yes. Upgrades are applied immediately with Stripe proration. Downgrades are scheduled for the next billing period.
pricing.faq2Q: Is there a contract or commitment?
pricing.faq2A: No long-term contract. Paid plans bill month to month, and you can cancel so the plan ends at the close of the current billing period.
pricing.faq3A: A response is when you send an introduction to a borrower's request. You only use a response credit when you actively reach out.
pricing.faq4Q: Do you offer discounts for annual billing?
pricing.faq4A: Not at this time. Plans are billed monthly through Stripe.
pricing.faq5Q: What happens if I exceed my monthly introductions?
pricing.faq5A: Basic and Pro plans need an available monthly credit before you can start a new paid conversation or introduction. If you run out, upgrade or wait for the next billing period reset.
pricing.faq6A: Not at this time. You can start on any monthly plan and change it later.

privacy.title: How mortly Handles Your Data
privacy.subtitle: What we collect, what stays out of standard marketplace flows, and which service providers help us run the platform.
privacy.transparencySubtitle: The main categories of information we process to run accounts, requests, chat, billing, and analytics.
privacy.controlSubtitle: Brokers can respond inside mortly, but mortly does not automatically reveal your direct contact details as part of standard request browsing or messaging.
privacy.step1Desc: Your request can include mortgage details such as product type, province, timeline, and notes. Your direct contact details are not part of the marketplace listing.
privacy.step2Desc: Verified brokers can respond inside mortly. They see your request details and conversation content, but not your direct contact details unless you choose to share them.
privacy.step3Title: Share More Only If You Want To
privacy.step3Desc: If you decide to send a phone number, email address, or other identifying information in chat or off-platform, that disclosure is your choice.
privacy.verificationSubtitle: Broker accounts start in a pending state and are reviewed before they can access borrower requests.
privacy.reportDesc: If you believe a broker, borrower, request, or conversation violated our rules, contact us at
privacy.reportDesc2: . We review reports and may warn, restrict, suspend, or remove accounts.
privacy.protection1Title: Direct Contact Details Stay Out of Listings
privacy.protection1Desc: mortly does not automatically include your phone number or email address in borrower request listings or standard marketplace messages.
privacy.protection2Desc: We use established providers for authentication, payments, email delivery, analytics, and real-time messaging, and we limit access to the data needed for each workflow.
privacy.protection3Desc: We do not sell personal information. If you want to request access, correction, deletion, or account closure, contact support and we will review the request subject to legal and operational retention needs.
privacy.protection4Desc: Broker access depends on profile verification and admin review. We also provide reporting and moderation tools to investigate complaints and misuse.
privacy.data1Desc: Basic account details and broker profile data
privacy.data1Purpose: To create accounts, authenticate users, and maintain borrower and broker profiles
privacy.data2Desc: Mortgage request details, introductions, and request activity
privacy.data2Purpose: To publish requests, match users, and show relevant marketplace activity
privacy.data3Desc: In-platform messages, reports, and activity timestamps
privacy.data3Purpose: To deliver conversations, investigate issues, and keep the marketplace functioning
privacy.data4Desc: Stripe billing data, analytics events, and operational email data
privacy.data4Purpose: To process broker subscriptions, send essential account emails, and improve the product
privacy.providersSubtitle: These third-party services help us operate core parts of mortly. They receive only the data needed for the services they provide.
privacy.provider1Desc: Processes broker subscriptions, recurring billing, billing portal access, and invoice history.
privacy.provider2Desc: Optional social sign-in provider for users who choose Google authentication.
privacy.provider3Desc: Sends verification codes and password-reset emails.
privacy.provider4Desc: Supports real-time message updates in chat.
privacy.provider5Desc: Help us measure product usage, diagnose issues, and improve the site.
privacy.requestsDesc: If you want to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your account data, contact
privacy.requestsDesc2: and include the email address on your account. We may retain certain records where required for security, billing, fraud prevention, or legal compliance.
privacy.verify1: Broker profile and license information submitted
privacy.heroDesc: This page explains what mortly collects, what verified brokers can see, and how we handle subscriptions, messaging, analytics, and support.
privacy.metaDesc: Learn what data mortly collects, how in-platform messaging works, and which providers support the service.
privacy.data1Item2: Password hash or sign-in provider details
privacy.data1Item4: Broker profile details such as brokerage name, province, license number, phone, and bio
privacy.data2Item1: Mortgage category, product types, province, city, and timeline
privacy.data2Item2: Request details, notes, and related marketplace activity
privacy.data2Item3: Broker introductions linked to a request
privacy.data3Item3: Reports submitted about requests, brokers, or conversations
privacy.data4Item1: Stripe customer, subscription, and invoice records for broker billing
privacy.data4Item2: Analytics and diagnostics events from PostHog and Vercel Analytics
privacy.data4Item3: Verification and password-reset email events sent through Resend
privacy.verify1Desc: Brokers must submit brokerage, province, and license information before they can access borrower requests.
privacy.verify2Desc: Broker accounts start in a pending state and require admin approval before messaging or responding.
privacy.verify3Desc: Admins can verify, reject, suspend, or ban accounts when reports or review findings warrant action.
privacy.verify4Desc: Users can report brokers, requests, and conversations. We review those reports and may warn, restrict, or remove accounts.

meta.homeDesc: Privacy-first marketplace where Canadian borrowers share mortgage needs without publishing direct contact details and verified brokers compete to connect. Free for borrowers, no obligation.
meta.aboutDesc: mortly is a privacy-first mortgage marketplace connecting Canadian borrowers with licensed mortgage brokers.
meta.howItWorksDesc: Learn how mortly connects borrowers with mortgage brokers through request posting, introductions, and in-platform messaging.
meta.forBrokersDesc: Join mortly to connect with qualified borrowers actively seeking mortgage brokers. Merit-based, transparent, and cost-effective.
meta.forBorrowersDesc: Find the right mortgage broker for free. Submit a request without publishing direct contact details, receive introductions from licensed brokers, and choose the best fit — no obligation.
meta.pricingDesc: Simple, transparent pricing for mortgage brokers. Choose the mortly plan that fits your business.

contact.metaDesc: Get in touch with the mortly team. We're here to help with any questions about our mortgage marketplace.
contact.title: We're Here to Help
contact.subtitle: Have a question about mortly? Whether you're a borrower or a broker, our team is ready to assist you.
contact.emailDesc: Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.responseDesc: We typically respond within 2 days and will do our best to assist you as quickly as possible.
contact.faqHint: Have a common question? Check our FAQ for quick answers.

onboarding.placeholderAreas: e.g. Greater Toronto Area, Hamilton, Niagara

terms.metaDesc: Read the rules for using mortly, including marketplace access, messaging, subscriptions, and account responsibilities.
terms.heroDesc: These Terms describe the current marketplace, messaging, billing, and account rules for using mortly.
terms.s1p1: By accessing or using mortly (the "Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the Platform.
terms.s1p2: We may update these Terms from time to time. If we make material changes, we will post the updated Terms and may provide additional notice by email or in-product messaging.
terms.s2p1: mortly is an online marketplace that lets borrowers submit mortgage requests, receive broker introductions, and exchange messages with verified brokers inside the Platform.
terms.s2p2: mortly is NOT a mortgage lender, financial advisor, or mortgage broker. We do not provide mortgage advice, make lending decisions, approve or deny mortgage applications, or act as a party to any mortgage transaction. All mortgage products and services are offered independently by licensed brokers on the Platform.
terms.s3p1: To use the Platform, you must:
terms.s3l1: Be at least 18 years of age
terms.s3l3: Have the legal capacity to enter into a binding agreement
terms.s3l4: Provide accurate and complete registration information
terms.s3p2: Brokers must additionally hold a valid mortgage broker license issued by their respective provincial regulator and maintain such license in good standing throughout their use of the Platform.
terms.s4p1: You must create an account to access the Platform's core features. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account.
terms.s4p2: You agree to: (a) provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration; (b) promptly update your information to keep it accurate; (c) notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account; and (d) not share your account with any other person.
terms.s4p3: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate any account that we reasonably believe has been compromised or is being used in violation of these Terms.
terms.s5p1: As a borrower on the Platform, you may submit mortgage requests free of charge. By submitting a request, you agree that:
terms.s5l1: The information you provide is accurate and truthful
terms.s5l2: Your request details, including information you place in request fields and notes, may be visible to verified brokers on the Platform
terms.s5l3: mortly does not automatically include your direct contact details in standard request browsing or in-platform messaging, but information you choose to share in messages or off-platform is your responsibility
terms.s5l4: You may receive introductions from multiple brokers and are under no obligation to engage with any of them
terms.s5l5: mortly does not guarantee the quality, accuracy, or suitability of any broker's services or advice
terms.s5p2: You may have up to 10 active requests at a time. Requests expire based on the Platform's configured posting window, which is 30 days by default. You may edit or delete requests while they are open or pending approval.
terms.s6p1: As a broker on the Platform, you acknowledge and agree that:
terms.s6l1: You hold a valid mortgage broker license issued by your provincial regulator
terms.s6l2: You will maintain your license in good standing at all times while using the Platform
terms.s6l3: You are subject to our broker verification process and may not access the marketplace until verified
terms.s6l4: All information in your profile, including your brokerage name, license number, and qualifications, is accurate and current
terms.s6l5: You will comply with all applicable federal and provincial laws, regulations, and industry standards
terms.s6l6: You will not engage in misleading, deceptive, or predatory practices
terms.s6p2: Brokers who fail to maintain their license or violate these Terms may have their verification status revoked and their account suspended or terminated.
terms.s7p1: Brokers may subscribe to paid plans to access enhanced features, including monthly response credits or higher messaging limits depending on the selected tier. Subscription plans and pricing are described on our Pricing page.
terms.s7p2: Subscriptions are billed monthly through our payment processor, Stripe. By subscribing, you authorize us to charge your payment method on a recurring basis.
terms.s7p3: You can manage, upgrade, downgrade, or cancel paid plans through the Platform and Stripe billing tools. Some changes, such as upgrades, may take effect immediately with proration, while cancellations generally apply at the end of the current billing period. Except where required by law, fees are non-refundable.
terms.s7p4: We may change subscription prices, plan features, or monthly credit allocations with advance notice before the affected renewal.
terms.s7p5: Monthly response credits reset at the start of each billing period and do not roll over. Premium plans are not limited by monthly response credits.
terms.s8l1: Provide false, misleading, or fraudulent information
terms.s8l2: Impersonate any person or entity, or misrepresent your affiliation with any person or entity
terms.s8l3: Harass, abuse, threaten, or intimidate other users
terms.s8l4: Use the Platform for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable laws or regulations
terms.s8l5: Attempt to misuse or circumvent the Platform's privacy or access controls
terms.s8l6: Scrape, harvest, or collect user data through automated means
terms.s8l7: Interfere with or disrupt the Platform's infrastructure, security, or functionality
terms.s8l8: Solicit users outside of the Platform to avoid subscription fees
terms.s8l9: Post or transmit unsolicited advertising, spam, or promotional materials
terms.s8l10: Attempt to access another user's account without authorization
terms.s9p1: All content, trademarks, logos, and intellectual property displayed on the Platform are owned by or licensed to mortly. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or create derivative works from any Platform content without our prior written consent.
terms.s9p2: By submitting content to the Platform (including request details, profile information, and messages), you grant mortly a non-exclusive, royalty-free, worldwide license to use, display, and process such content solely for the purpose of operating and improving the Platform.
terms.s9p3: You retain ownership of the content you submit and are solely responsible for ensuring it does not infringe on any third party's rights.
terms.s10p1: Your use of the Platform is also governed by our Privacy & Trust policy, which describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal information. By using the Platform, you consent to the practices described in our privacy policy.
terms.s10p2: We aim to keep direct contact details out of standard request browsing and in-platform messaging. If you include identifying information in request fields, messages, or off-platform communications, that disclosure is your choice.
terms.s11p1: Users may report concerns about brokers, requests, or conversations through the Platform's reporting system. We investigate all reports and take appropriate action, which may include warnings, suspension, or permanent banning of accounts.
terms.s11p2: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to suspend or terminate any user's account for violations of these Terms or for conduct that we determine is harmful to the Platform, its users, or third parties.
terms.s11p3: If your account is suspended or terminated, you may contact us at support@mortly.ca to request a review of the decision.
terms.s12p1: THE PLATFORM IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.
terms.s12p2: We do not warrant that: (a) the Platform will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free; (b) any information provided by brokers is accurate, complete, or reliable; (c) any mortgage transaction facilitated through the Platform will be satisfactory; or (d) any defects in the Platform will be corrected.
terms.s12p3: You acknowledge that mortgage decisions involve significant financial risk and that you should independently verify all information and seek professional advice before entering into any mortgage agreement.
terms.s13p1: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, MORTLY, ITS DIRECTORS, OFFICERS, EMPLOYEES, AGENTS, AND AFFILIATES SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, OR GOODWILL, ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO YOUR USE OF THE PLATFORM.
terms.s13p2: Our total aggregate liability for all claims arising out of or related to these Terms or your use of the Platform shall not exceed the greater of: (a) the amount you paid to us in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim; or (b) one hundred Canadian dollars (CAD $100).
terms.s14p1: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless mortly and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any and all claims, liabilities, damages, losses, costs, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or related to: (a) your use of the Platform; (b) your violation of these Terms; (c) your violation of any applicable law or regulation; or (d) any content you submit through the Platform.
terms.s15p1: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Province of Ontario and the applicable federal laws of Canada, unless mandatory law requires otherwise.
terms.s15p2: If you have a dispute with us, you agree to first contact us in good faith at support@mortly.ca. If the dispute cannot be resolved informally, it may be brought in the courts of competent jurisdiction in Ontario, unless mandatory law requires a different forum.
terms.s15p3: Notwithstanding the foregoing, either party may seek injunctive or other equitable relief in any court of competent jurisdiction to prevent the actual or threatened infringement of intellectual property rights.
terms.s16p1: You may stop using the Platform at any time. If you want us to close your account, contact us at support@mortly.ca.
terms.s16p2: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice, if we reasonably believe you have violated these Terms or if required by law.
terms.s16p3: Upon termination: (a) all licenses granted to you under these Terms will immediately end; (b) you must cease all use of the Platform; (c) any outstanding subscription fees remain payable; and (d) provisions that by their nature should survive termination will continue to apply.
terms.s17p1: If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.
terms.s17p2: Our failure to enforce any provision of these Terms shall not constitute a waiver of that provision or any other provision.
terms.s17p3: These Terms, together with our Privacy & Trust policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and mortly regarding your use of the Platform.
terms.s17p4: You may not assign or transfer your rights or obligations under these Terms without our prior written consent. We may assign our rights and obligations without restriction.
terms.s18p1: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at:
